name: Tourtiere a La Ouananiche (Lac St-Jean Salmon Pie)
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Ouananiche or salmon, cut into small pieces
recipeInstructions:
Servings: 6
1. Line a 9-inch pie plate with pastry.
2. Heat butter in a frying pan and sauté onion until soft but not browned.
3. Add potatoes, fish, salt, pepper, milk, and cream; mix gently so as not to break up the pieces of fish.
4. Arrange mixture evenly in the pastry shell.
5. Gently stir in water; it should come halfway up the fish mixture.
6. Cover with top crust, trim, and crimping edge to seal.
7. Cut a small hole in the center.
8. Brush pastry with beaten egg and milk.
9. Bake in a preheated 375°F oven for 45 to 50 minutes or until crust is browned.
